'''shahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beerishly|beerishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beerishly|beerishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shahate|shahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shahatesher|shahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahatesherĂ«m|shahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shahatero|shahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahateshĂ«|shahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahateshĂ«m|shahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishahatero|gokishahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahateshĂ«|gokishahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahateshĂ«m|gokishahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshahankerom|goshahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahankeshĂ«|goshahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahankeshĂ«m|goshahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshahankeya|goshahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shahaterom|shahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahatemu|shahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shahateya|shahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishahaterom|gokishahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahatemu|gokishahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishahateya|gokishahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shahahate|shahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shahahatesher|shahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahahatesherĂ«m|shahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shahahatero|shahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahahateshĂ«|shahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahahateshĂ«m|shahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishahahatero|gokishahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahahateshĂ«|gokishahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahahateshĂ«m|gokishahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshahahankerom|goshahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahahankeshĂ«|goshahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahahankeshĂ«m|goshahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshahahankeya|goshahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shahahaterom|shahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahahatemu|shahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shahahateya|shahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishahahaterom|gokishahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahahatemu|gokishahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishahahateya|gokishahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠte|shĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠtesher|shĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠtero|shĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠhĂŠtero|gokishĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠhĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠhĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠterom|shĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠtemu|shĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠhĂŠteya|shĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠhĂŠterom|gokishĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠhĂŠteya|gokishĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafhafte|shafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafhaftesher|shafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafhaftesherĂ«m|shafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafhaftero|shafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafhafteshĂ«|shafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafhafteshĂ«m|shafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafhaftero|gokishafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafhafteshĂ«|gokishafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafhafteshĂ«m|gokishafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafhafnkerom|goshafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafhafnkeshĂ«|goshafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafhafnkeshĂ«m|goshafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafhafnkeya|goshafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafhafterom|shafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafhaftemu|shafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafhafteya|shafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafhafterom|gokishafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafhaftemu|gokishafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafhafteya|gokishafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
